name: setup-cc-room
description: Install cc-room — bring your Claude Code into a shared LAN meeting room
author: Takanori Suzuki

scripts.build: tsup src/index.ts src/installer.ts src/settings-merger.ts src/register-service.ts src/validators.ts src/daemon-resolver.ts src/paths.ts --format esm --dts
scripts.prepack: pnpm run build && pnpm run pack:vendor
